relationships.context: Extracts distinctive 2-5 word phrases from Vrijen's speaker turns
Purpose is to achieve voice authenticity in communications
Produces phrasePool as output with scored candidates
Phrases scored with base 0.5 plus bonuses for matches
Produces Link Map with confidence-scored link matches
Loads essential links configuration as first step
Assigns 0.0-1.0 confidence based on keyword and context match
Contains lexicon section with signature expressions
Owns the distinctive phrases stored in lexicon
